name: Suspicious In-Memory Module Execution
notes:
This rule detects process access events by suspicious processes which have reflectively loaded libraries in their memory space.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Perez Diego (@darkquassar), oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro
SIGMA Title: Suspicious In-Memory Module Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects the access to processes by other suspicious processes which have reflectively loaded libraries in their memory space. An example is SilentTrinity C2 behaviour. Generally speaking, when Sysmon EventID 10 cannot reference a stack call to a dll loaded from disk (the standard way), it will display "UNKNOWN" as the module name. Usually this means the stack call points to a module that was reflectively loaded in memory. Adding to this, it is not common to see such few calls in the stack (ntdll.dll --> kernelbase.dll --> unknown) which essentially means that most of the functions required by the process to execute certain routines are already present in memory, not requiring any calls to external libraries. The latter should also be considered suspicious.


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess

when the event matches (LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\ntdll.dll+%' and LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%|c:\windows\system32\kernelbase.dll+%' and LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%|unknown(%') or (LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE 'unknown(%' and LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%)|unknown(%') or (LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE 'unknown%' and (LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1f0fff' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1f1fff' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x143a' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1410' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1010' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1f2fff' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1f3fff' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1fffff')) AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\sdiagnhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\procexp64.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\procexp.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\microsoft vs code\code.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\aurora-agent-64.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\aurora-agent.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\git\usr\bin\sh.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\ide\devenv.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\githubdesktop\update.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\runtimebroker.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\backgroundtaskhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\githubdesktop.exe' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files (x86)\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\microsoft.net\framework\%\ngentask.exe%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files (x86)\microsoft visual studio\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files\microsoft visual studio\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\microsoft.net\framework%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\driverstore\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\windowspowershell\%' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\taskhostw.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\ctfmon.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\nhnotifsys.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\immersivecontrolpanel\systemsettings.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\explorer.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\runtimebroker.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%\microsoft vs code\code.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("call trace") LIKE '%|c:\windows\system32\rpcrt4.dll+%' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\explorer.exe' and (LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\backgroundtaskhost.exe' or LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\explorer.exe') AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\programdata\microsoft\windows defender\platform\%' and LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\msmpeng.exe' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\eclipse.exe' and (LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%\jre\bin\java.dll%' or LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%|c:\windows\system32\windows.storage.dll+%' or LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%\configuration\org.eclipse.osgi\%') AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\openwith.exe' and LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\explorer.exe' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\users\%' and LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\teams\current\teams.exe' and (LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%:\windows\explorer.exe' or LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\teams\update.exe' or LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\teams\current\teams.exe' or LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%\msmpeng.exe') AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\wwahost.exe' and LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\svchost.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\sppsvc.exe' and LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\sppextcomobj.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious In-Memory Module Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\ntdll.dll+%' and LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%|c:\windows\system32\kernelbase.dll+%' and LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%|unknown(%') or (LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE 'unknown(%' and LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%)|unknown(%') or (LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE 'unknown%' and (LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1f0fff' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1f1fff' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x143a' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1410' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1010' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1f2fff' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1f3fff' or LOWER("Granted Access") LIKE '0x1fffff')) AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\sdiagnhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\procexp64.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\procexp.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\microsoft vs code\code.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\aurora-agent-64.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\aurora-agent.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\git\usr\bin\sh.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\ide\devenv.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\githubdesktop\update.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\runtimebroker.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\backgroundtaskhost.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\githubdesktop.exe' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files (x86)\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\microsoft.net\framework\%\ngentask.exe%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files (x86)\microsoft visual studio\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files\microsoft visual studio\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\microsoft.net\framework%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\driverstore\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\windowspowershell\%' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\taskhostw.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\ctfmon.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\nhnotifsys.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\immersivecontrolpanel\systemsettings.exe' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\explorer.exe' AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\runtimebroker.exe' AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%\microsoft vs code\code.exe' AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("call trace") LIKE '%|c:\windows\system32\rpcrt4.dll+%' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\explorer.exe' and (LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\backgroundtaskhost.exe' or LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\explorer.exe') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\programdata\microsoft\windows defender\platform\%' and LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\msmpeng.exe' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\eclipse.exe' and (LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%\jre\bin\java.dll%' or LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%|c:\windows\system32\windows.storage.dll+%' or LOWER("Call Trace") LIKE '%\configuration\org.eclipse.osgi\%') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\openwith.exe' and LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\explorer.exe' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\users\%' and LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\teams\current\teams.exe' and (LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%:\windows\explorer.exe' or LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\teams\update.exe' or LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\local\microsoft\teams\current\teams.exe' or LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE '%\msmpeng.exe') AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\wwahost.exe' and LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\svchost.exe' AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\sppsvc.exe' and LOWER("Target Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\windows\system32\sppextcomobj.exe' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious In-Memory Module Execution
Event description: Detects process access events by suspicious processes which have reflectively loaded libraries in their memory space.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
